title: Snooze button doesn't show snooze duration
description: The large Snooze button on the alarm dismiss screen just says 'Snooze' with no indication of how long the snooze will be. Users can't make an informed decision about whether to snooze or dismiss.

PM.notes: Should-fix. Critical context for user decision-making.

Dev Lead.notes: Pass snoozeMins to composable, show 'Snooze Xm', <10 lines.
